task_completion.description: Set document text to 12pt Liberation Serif or Times New Roman.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the font family dropdown showing 'Liberation Serif' or 'Times New Roman' (or 'Tinos') and the font size dropdown showing '12' while text is selected.

task_completion.description: Set all four page margins to 1.0 inch.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Page Setup or Margins dialog box showing 1.0 inch (or equivalent, like 2.54 cm) for Top, Bottom, Left, and Right margins, or the document ruler visually indicating 1-inch margins.

task_completion.description: Apply 'Heading 1' style to the company name 'Meridian Property Group, LLC'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Meridian Property Group, LLC' at the top of the document. The styles dropdown/menu should show 'Heading 1' is active when this text is selected, or it should visually appear much larger and bolder than the body text.

task_completion.description: Apply bold formatting to the 'Re:' subject line and the signer's name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Re: Notice of HVAC System Replacement...' line and the name 'Jonathan R. Whitfield' at the bottom to be visibly bolded compared to the rest of the text.

task_completion.description: Add 12pt of space after each body paragraph.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Paragraph formatting dialog showing 'Spacing: Below paragraph' set to 12pt (or 0.17 inches), or visually distinct, uniform gaps between the body paragraphs.

task_completion.description: Save the formatted document as tenant_notice_final.docx.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog saving the file to '/home/ga/Documents/tenant_notice_final.docx', or the word processor's title bar displaying 'tenant_notice_final.docx'.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor (like LibreOffice Writer) to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the LibreOffice Writer interface. The agent should not be using a terminal to run Python scripts (like python-docx) to bypass GUI interaction.

integrity.description: The original letter content was preserved and not overwritten with a generic template.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the presence of specific key phrases in the document text: 'HVAC System Replacement', 'Dominion Mechanical Services', and 'Ms. Catherine Delacroix'.

integrity.description: The agent actively interacted with formatting menus and dialogs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing open dialog boxes for Page Style, Paragraph, Character, or the Styles sidebar being actively used.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input file is '/home/ga/Documents/tenant_notice_draft.docx' and the output file must be '/home/ga/Documents/tenant_notice_final.docx'. Target formatting: Font must be Liberation Serif, Times New Roman, or Tinos at exactly 12pt. Margins must be 1.0 inch on all four sides. Spacing must be 12pt after body paragraphs. The document must contain the key phrases: 'Meridian Property Group', 'HVAC System Replacement', 'Dominion Mechanical Services', 'Ms. Delacroix', and 'Jonathan R. Whitfield'.
